title: NRC Advanced Reactors overview
source_summary: NRC overview of advanced reactor activities and regulatory context.
what_it_establishes: NRC is actively preparing for and reviewing advanced reactor technologies.
what_it_does_not_establish: It does not establish that a specific company has a docketed application, approved design, site, customer, or schedule.
why_it_matters: Useful context, but not project proof.

title: NRC Pre-Application Process
source_summary: NRC guidance describing pre-application interactions before formal applications.
what_it_establishes: Pre-application engagement can identify issues and prepare applicants.
what_it_does_not_establish: It is not the same as docketing, approval, or construction authorization.
why_it_matters: Pre-application claims should be diligence-weighted below submitted applications.

title: NRC Readiness Assessment
source_summary: NRC voluntary readiness assessment process for draft applications.
what_it_establishes: Can surface information gaps and support NRC/applicant planning.
what_it_does_not_establish: Does not predetermine application acceptance, docketing, or regulatory findings.
why_it_matters: Helps classify readiness evidence without overstating it.

title: NRC ARCAP / TI-CAP guidance
source_summary: Technology-inclusive application guidance for advanced reactor licensing content.
what_it_establishes: Advanced reactor applications require structured safety and licensing content.
what_it_does_not_establish: Does not establish that a specific project has produced or submitted that content.
why_it_matters: Shows why generic regulatory engagement is not enough for bankable timing.

title: NRC advanced reactor pre-application activities
source_summary: NRC page listing advanced reactor pre-application activity where available.
what_it_establishes: Public NRC engagement exists for listed projects or concepts.
what_it_does_not_establish: Does not prove commercial deployment, site readiness, customer demand, or financing.
why_it_matters: Useful for separating public engagement from formal application maturity.

title: NRC HALEU overview
source_summary: NRC overview of HALEU and new fuel regulatory needs.
what_it_establishes: HALEU production, use, storage, and transportation are regulated topics.
what_it_does_not_establish: Does not establish that a project has secured HALEU supply or fuel fabrication.
why_it_matters: Supports treating HALEU as a deployment dependency.

title: NRC Transportation of New Fuels
source_summary: NRC page on transportation considerations for new fuels.
what_it_establishes: Transportation and criticality/package review can matter for HALEU-containing fuels.
what_it_does_not_establish: Does not prove any project has a transport package, route, or logistics plan.
why_it_matters: First-core timing can fail on logistics, not just enrichment.

title: NRC Security & Safeguards of New Fuels
source_summary: NRC page on safeguards and physical security for new fuels.
what_it_establishes: HALEU enrichment and quantities can trigger safeguards and material-control obligations.
what_it_does_not_establish: Does not establish a facility-specific safeguards plan or approval.
why_it_matters: Security scope can be a hidden schedule and cost dependency.

title: NRC Storage and Disposal of New Fuels
source_summary: NRC page on storage/disposal considerations for advanced fuels.
what_it_establishes: Advanced fuel concepts require storage, transport, and disposal analysis.
what_it_does_not_establish: Does not prove a project has an operating or waste strategy.
why_it_matters: Keeps operations/waste visible in deployment diligence.

title: DOE HALEU Availability Program
source_summary: DOE program intended to support domestic HALEU availability.
what_it_establishes: The federal government recognizes HALEU availability as important to advanced reactors.
what_it_does_not_establish: Does not prove a named company has binding allocation, delivery, fabrication, or transport.
why_it_matters: Useful market support, but not project-specific fuel proof.

title: DOE HALEU allocation process
source_summary: DOE materials on requesting/allocating HALEU where available.
what_it_establishes: Conditional allocation or request processes may be relevant to fuel access.
what_it_does_not_establish: Does not equal complete commercial fuel readiness or project bankability.
why_it_matters: Helps distinguish program signals from binding supply.

title: DOE HALEU enrichment services procurement
source_summary: Public DOE materials on HALEU production/enrichment support.
what_it_establishes: DOE is procuring/supporting enrichment services to build supply.
what_it_does_not_establish: Does not establish specific project delivery windows or customer reservations.
why_it_matters: Relevant to fuel-cycle market capacity, not individual demand certainty.

title: NuScale design certification / review precedent
source_summary: NRC page for completed NuScale SMR design certification review.
what_it_establishes: A mature design review can generate extensive public NRC evidence.
what_it_does_not_establish: Does not prove project financing, customer commitment, EPC delivery, or commercial success.
why_it_matters: Benchmark: licensing progress is necessary but insufficient.

title: NuScale RAI/application document precedent
source_summary: NRC documents for NuScale application review including RAIs and evaluations.
what_it_establishes: Serious licensing reviews leave detailed public document trails.
what_it_does_not_establish: Does not prove any new project using that design is financeable.
why_it_matters: Useful benchmark for evidence depth.

title: Kairos Hermes construction permit
source_summary: NRC issued a construction permit for Kairos Hermes test reactor.
what_it_establishes: Shows public permit precedent for an advanced test reactor.
what_it_does_not_establish: Does not establish commercial power deployment, customer offtake, or campus-scale economics.
why_it_matters: Important benchmark, with scope limitations.

title: TerraPower Natrium / Kemmerer NRC materials
source_summary: NRC public materials for Kemmerer construction permit application.
what_it_establishes: A public application record and review schedule can be inspected.
what_it_does_not_establish: Does not resolve fuel availability, cost, construction, or customer risks.
why_it_matters: Benchmark for what public regulatory maturity looks like.

title: TRISO-X fuel fabrication review / RAIs
source_summary: NRC page for TRISO-X fuel fabrication facility licensing application.
what_it_establishes: Fuel fabrication has its own licensing, RAI, safeguards, and facility execution path.
what_it_does_not_establish: Does not prove reactor deployment demand or facility capacity on a specific schedule.
why_it_matters: Fabrication is a separate bottleneck from reactor licensing.

title: NRC fuel fabrication facilities page
source_summary: NRC overview of regulated fuel fabrication facilities and categories.
what_it_establishes: Fuel fabrication is independently regulated and can involve Category II requirements.
what_it_does_not_establish: Does not establish a specific supplier has available qualified capacity.
why_it_matters: Supports diligence on fabrication route and safeguards.

title: Palisades restart public precedent
source_summary: Public DOE LPO materials around Palisades restart financing.
what_it_establishes: Government financing can support nuclear restart economics/policy goals.
what_it_does_not_establish: Restart precedent is not the same as new-build SMR or data center campus delivery.
why_it_matters: Useful financing/policy benchmark with limited transferability.

title: Vogtle construction / financing precedent
source_summary: DOE LPO page on Vogtle loan guarantees and large nuclear construction.
what_it_establishes: Large nuclear construction can require major financing support and long execution.
what_it_does_not_establish: Does not prove advanced reactor modular construction will be easier or financeable.
why_it_matters: Keeps construction and financing risk visible.

title: DOE LPO application process
source_summary: DOE LPO application process information.
what_it_establishes: Federal debt support has process, eligibility, diligence, and conditions.
what_it_does_not_establish: Does not prove any company has applied, been approved, or can close financing.
why_it_matters: Useful for testing financing claims.

title: Title 17 clean energy financing
source_summary: DOE LPO Title 17 financing overview.
what_it_establishes: Nuclear and related clean-energy projects may fit federal financing pathways.
what_it_does_not_establish: Does not establish committed project capital.
why_it_matters: Helps separate financing eligibility from financing evidence.

title: FERC generator interconnection reform/orders
source_summary: FERC materials on interconnection processes and reforms.
what_it_establishes: Interconnection queues/process can be material to power delivery.
what_it_does_not_establish: Does not prove a specific site has interconnection rights or islanded authority.
why_it_matters: Large-load claims need power-delivery evidence.

title: ERCOT large load interconnection context
source_summary: Public grid/operator materials relevant to load/resource interconnection context.
what_it_establishes: Power delivery depends on grid-region rules and queue realities.
what_it_does_not_establish: Does not prove a claimed campus can energize.
why_it_matters: Good placeholder for future ISO/RTO source expansion.

title: Public company investor materials / filings
source_summary: Public filings/investor materials can disclose risk factors, contracts, liquidity, and commercial status.
what_it_establishes: Company documents can support or weaken claimed commercial readiness.
what_it_does_not_establish: They may omit confidential contracts, pricing, private NRC feedback, and non-public customer terms.
why_it_matters: Use as public-source evidence, not truth serum.

title: Microsoft nuclear power public sourcing context
source_summary: Public corporate materials may describe energy procurement and nuclear interest.
what_it_establishes: Can establish public buyer interest or announced strategy.
what_it_does_not_establish: Does not prove a specific project PPA, pricing, credit, or deliverability.
why_it_matters: Power-buyer claims need contract evidence.

title: AWS nuclear/data center power public sourcing context
source_summary: Public AWS/Amazon materials may describe energy procurement and nuclear-related interest.
what_it_establishes: Can establish public buyer interest or announced strategy.
what_it_does_not_establish: Does not prove a specific project PPA, pricing, credit, or deliverability.
why_it_matters: Power-buyer claims need contract evidence.
